title: Dark Smooth GUI
description: Adds a dark smooth GUI to Minecraft, with support for many mods GUIs
body:
![banner](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/banner_dgui.png)

***

Adds a smooth dark GUI to every container and screen in the game

![example_image](https://git.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs/blob/main/images/main_menu_dark.jpg)

## Mods compatibility

| Mods ↓ MC Versions → | 1.17.x | 1.18.x | 1.19.x | 1.20.x | 1.21.x | 26.1 |
|:--------------------:|:------:|:------:|:------:|:------:|:------:|:----:|
| Armor HUD | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ⏹️ (1.20.4-1.20.6) | ✅ | ✅ |
| Axiom | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| CTM Selector | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| EMI | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| ETF | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Inventory Tabs | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ⏹️ (1.21-1.20.1) | ❌ | ❌ |
| Iris | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ➖ | ➖ |
| ItemSwapper | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| ModMenu | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| NoChatReports | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Raised | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Sodium | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Sophisticated Series | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| SimpleVoiceChat | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |

> ❌ Mod not supported for this version
>
> ⏹️ Not all versions in the range are supported
>
> ✅ Mod supported for this version
>
> ➖ Mod not needed for this version

***

> If you find an issue with this pack, make sure to report it here: https://todo.sr.ht/~aeldit/MC-Resourcepacks-And-Datapacks so I can fix it
>
> If you have a suggestion, you can go on my discord server and create a post in 🗽-suggestions-forum
>
> [![discord_badge](https://img.shields.io/discord/750243612473819188?color=7289da&label=DISCORD&logo=discord&logoColor=7289da&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/PcYPpqzhKS)
